Cookies lifecycle + migration.question: When to save cookies?
Cookies lifecycle + migration.answer: End of session only — in worker.ts finally block, just before releaseProfile(). One GET /browser/{id}/cookies per action.

Cookies lifecycle + migration.question: Idle delay before shutdown?
Cookies lifecycle + migration.answer: Random uniform 30-60s between save-cookies and releaseProfile().

Cookies lifecycle + migration.question: Restore failure / logged-out handling?
Cookies lifecycle + migration.answer: We don't store credentials — CU cannot auto-login. Action aborts; user must reconnect manually via the existing GoLogin Cloud Browser URL.

Cookies lifecycle + migration.question: Reconnect UX?
Cookies lifecycle + migration.answer: Reconnect button on account-card → opens existing GoLogin Cloud Browser URL → user logs in manually → next worker run saves new cookies. No new screens.

Cookies lifecycle + migration.question: Worker status on logged-out abort?
Cookies lifecycle + migration.answer: New ENUM value 'needs_reconnect' on health_status. Requires small migration alongside cookies_jar. UI badge variant added.

Cookies lifecycle + migration.question: Migration shape?
Cookies lifecycle + migration.answer: cookies_jar JSONB nullable default NULL on browser_profiles + new ENUM value 'needs_reconnect' on health_status. No timestamp columns.

Preflight scope, transport & caching.question: Platforms in scope?
Preflight scope, transport & caching.answer: Reddit only — BPRX-08 wording is Reddit-specific. LinkedIn preflight deferred to a future phase.

Preflight scope, transport & caching.question: Transport?
Preflight scope, transport & caching.answer: Direct fetch through the account's residential proxy, no browser. ~500ms, no GoLogin spin-up.

Preflight scope, transport & caching.question: Cache storage?
Preflight scope, transport & caching.answer: Two new columns on social_accounts: last_preflight_at TIMESTAMPTZ + last_preflight_status TEXT. Worker checks last_preflight_at > now()-1h before re-fetching.

Preflight scope, transport & caching.question: Shadowban check?
Preflight scope, transport & caching.answer: Dropped from this phase — requires authenticated whoami which contradicts BPRX-08's no-auth rule. is_suspended + total_karma<5 + HTTP 404 satisfy 'health flips before browser spins up'.

Preflight failure taxonomy & false-posit.question: Distinguish banned vs transient?
Preflight failure taxonomy & false-posit.answer: HTTP-status-based: 200+is_suspended:true → banned; 404 → banned; 200+karma<5 → banned; 403 → banned; 5xx/timeout/proxy-error → transient (don't flip status, abort with retry-eligible failure).

Preflight failure taxonomy & false-posit.question: Retry policy?
Preflight failure taxonomy & false-posit.answer: No retry on definitive signals (is_suspended/404/403/karma<5). Single retry with 2s backoff on transient (5xx/timeout/proxy-error).

Preflight failure taxonomy & false-posit.question: Status mapping?
Preflight failure taxonomy & false-posit.answer: All three definitive failure signals → health_status='banned'. Single semantic state, single alert path. Existing worker.ts:78 quarantine guard handles uniformly.

Preflight failure taxonomy & false-posit.question: Pipeline placement?
Preflight failure taxonomy & false-posit.answer: New gate in worker.ts immediately after the existing quarantine guard (line 78) and BEFORE connectToProfile. Reddit-only guard (account.platform === 'reddit'). On flip: write DB + return failure without connectToProfile call — satisfies BPRX-08 'no GoLogin spin-up'.

deferred_ideas: Shadowban detection — needs an authenticated session; defer to a phase that can spend one OR rely on Area 4 CU detector for in-action shadowban signals
